_comment: mcpo multi-server config: serves several MCP servers behind one mcpo, each under its own path prefix (/packet-coders, /filesystem). Copy to a machine-local path (e.g. ~/.config/packet-coders-mcpo.config.json), replace the placeholders, then run: uvx mcpo --port 8000 --api-key <KEY> --config <this-file>. In Open WebUI add ONE tool server per prefix, e.g. http://<host>:8000/packet-coders and http://<host>:8000/filesystem.
